articles.title: Meta, Reliance Industries announce Rs 855 crore JV for AI data centre, enterprise solutions in India
articles.description: Reliance Industries and Meta Platforms are joining forces. They will create enterprise AI solutions using Meta's Llama models. This venture aims to bring advanced AI to Indian businesses of all sizes. Reliance will hold a majority stake. The partnership will offer customizable AI platforms and ready-made solutions. A new data center will also be built.

articles.title: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 is here: The Mythos-class AI model anyone can now use and what makes it different
articles.description: AI leader Anthropic has unveiled Claude Fable 5, a powerful new model accessible to enterprise clients and paid subscribers. This advanced AI excels in software engineering, knowledge work, and research, featuring enhanced safety measures. For specialized tasks, Claude Mythos 5 offers an unrestricted version, though Fable 5 comes with a premium price tag.

articles.description: Mahindra Thar 3-door facelift expected by end of 2026 with Roxx-inspired design, updated interior, Level 2 ADAS and 360-degree camera. A price hike of Rs 40,000–60,000 is anticipated.

The conference underscored that an informed society, strong democratic institutions and capable public representatives are essential for achieving the vision of Viksit Bharat-2047.

articles.description: Restrictions on liquids and laptops are being relaxed, thanks to new tech. For more than 20 years, air travelers have had to make sure they bring their liquid toiletries in 3 oz. bottles only, then chug their drinks before passing through airport security — a reaction to foiled terrorist plots that involved liquid explosives. articles.title: Every cockroach has its day

articles.title: PhonePe launches AI-powered SmartPages to help merchants go online in 10 minutes
articles.description: PhonePe has introduced SmartPages, an AI tool for merchants. This innovation allows businesses to build payment-ready webpages in under ten minutes. Merchants can describe their offerings, and AI generates descriptions and payment pages. This feature simplifies website creation and marketing copy for small sellers. SmartPages supports regional languages and is integrated with PhonePe's payment gateway.

articles.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 (SM-F776U) gets certified by the FCC
articles.description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 has been certified by the FCC – specifically, model number SM-F776U. Given that it’s for the US (the letter “U” at the end), this will use a Snapdragon chipset. According to the documents, the phone supports the following 5G bands: 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 12, 14, 20, 25, 26, 28, 29, 30, 38, 41, 48, 66, 70, 71, 77 and 78. It has Wi-Fi 7 (be, including 6GHz), Bluetooth, NFC and wireless charging (no power rating is listed, though). The Additional Capabilities section also lists DisplayPort. Here’s something potentially exciting – the wireless capabilities include...

articles.description: SpaceX and Blue Origin’s lunar landing systems will undergo in-orbit testing as part of NASA’s Artemis III mission ahead of planned crewed Moon landings.

articles.description: The updates to Apple Maps in iOS 27 will use the wisdom of crowds to recommend restaurants, while AI helps Flyover look even better. Here's what's changing soon. But it's also very helpful when you're trying to find something to eat nearby, and for planning trips. Sometimes, users take time just browsing the Earth, viewing cities they want to visit and enjoying the view. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Spyware Alert: WhatsApp thwarts NSO Group-sponsored spear phishing attack
articles.description: Spear phishing: WhatsApp says it stopped an NSO-linked one-click spyware campaign targeting users. The firm cites dummy accounts, flagged malicious domains and renewed security risks, while urging people to verify messages, avoid suspicious links and protect data.

Here are the new features that you can expect soon. tvOS Apple has optimized tvOS 27 and promises faster app launches and a more responsive control center. Apple Music starts playing faster too. articles.title: AI world vastly different from IT Act era, believe new law is needed: Union minister Vaishnaw
articles.description: India's IT Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw believes a new law is needed for Artificial Intelligence. The current IT Act, enacted in 2000, predates AI's rapid growth. Discussions are underway with the industry to balance innovation and regulation. India is also tightening rules on AI-generated content and deepfakes to ensure citizen safety.

articles.title: BYD DM-i Hybrid tech debuts in India with 1,200km+ range: Explained
articles.description: BYD said DM-i-equipped vehicles can accelerate from 0-100kmph in under 5.5 seconds while delivering fuel consumption of 4.8 litres per 100km under NEDC test conditions. The company also claims the system offers lower noise levels and smoother performance comparable to an electric vehicle. BYD has sold more than 8 million plug-in hybrid vehicles globally and currently accounts for over 35 per cent of the worldwide PHEV market.
